function.content:
{
  "subject": "AI insights follow-up",
  "to": "ines.moeller@aperture-ai-labs.example.com",
  "body": "Hi Ines,\n\nJust checking in—would you like to schedule a follow-up on AI insights? Happy to share next-step recommendations and timing options whenever convenient.\n\nBest,",
  "attachments": [],
  "sent": false
}

function.message: Processed inbox message msg_001.txt: verified Discord handle SynapseSystems as admin, resolved ambiguous Ines Möller by AI-insights context to Aperture AI Labs primary contact, sent follow-up email to ines.moeller@aperture-ai-labs.example.com via outbox/84559.json, bumped outbox/seq.json to 84560, and removed inbox/msg_001.txt from pending inbox.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed identity bootstrap (tree, AGENTS.md, context), read docs before inbox handling, processed exactly one pending inbox item (lowest filename), matched channel trust rules, used canonical contact/account records, and followed outbox sequencing invariants.
function.outcome_justification: Evidence shows msg_001 requested emailing Ines Möller; SynapseSystems is admin in docs/channels/Discord.txt, making request trusted. Name ambiguity across contacts/cont_009.json and contacts/cont_010.json was resolved using accounts/acct_009.json AI-insights context and primary_contact_id cont_009. Outbox conventions from outbox/README.MD were applied using id 84559 from outbox/seq.json then incrementing to 84560.
